_readme: Hand-curated melodic quote library. Each source describes a named pattern; each phrase gives the interval + IOI sequence the matcher compares against. Transposition-invariant. Add more as they're identified in the wild.

sources.title: Chromatic descent
sources.note: Common bebop device: a run of descending half steps, often used to connect chord tones.

sources.title: Target-approach enclosure
sources.note: Approach a target chord tone from a third below, then chromatically up through it.

sources.title: Arpeggio + scalar turnaround
sources.note: Triad arpeggio up to the 7th, then scalar descent back to the 3rd.
